summary: MathTutor admin portal with student approval flow and class creation features. Admin login uses hardcoded credentials (admin@mathtutor.com / Admin@123).
architectural_notes: Hardcoded default admin account: email=admin@mathtutor.com, password=Admin@123

existing_features.title: Update the frontend Login page so that when the admin login form is submitted with email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123', it correctly authenticates against the backend (and/or localStorage fallback) using these exact credentials, stores the admin session, and redirects to the admin dashboard without showing 'invalid credentials'.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update the backend admin authentication logic so that the hardcoded admin account uses the email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'. The login check must match against these exact credentials and return a valid admin session/token on success.
